header: What you stop paying for when Desiderio moves in
subheadline: One GPL package replaces the template scaffold, the component library, and the demo content of a typical relaunch — weeks of dev time, gone from the estimate.

items.title: Demo site in one command
items.description: desiderio:styleguide:seed builds a complete, browsable demo site — idempotent, workspaces-safe, and ready to show a client the same afternoon.

items.title: Quality enforced, not hoped for
items.description: An 11-category zero-tolerance audit keeps all 255 elements clean: no inline styles, no hardcoded colors, ever.

items.title: PHPStan max + 400 tests
items.description: Static analysis at the strictest level and a 400-test CI across PHP 8.3 and 8.4 — the code review you didn't have to schedule.

items.title: Editors who stop filing tickets
items.description: Backend previews for every element and guided Content Blocks forms mean non-developers ship landing pages on their own.

items.title: Redesigns in minutes
items.description: Switch between 15 shadcn theme presets and the site repaints instantly — every campaign gets its own look without a deployment window.

items.title: 5 icon libraries, one switch
items.description: Swap Lucide for Tabler, HugeIcons, Phosphor, or Remix Icon sitewide — stable semantic keys keep every element's content untouched.
